breakdown.creativeCore: Futuristic 3D Food Printer Landing Page：Generates a website mockup for a sci-fi appliance that prints memories as magical desserts, featuring UI elements and detailed product visuals.
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d, sci-fi]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
